books.title: Antigone
books.author: Sophocles
books.summary: A young woman defies the king’s decree to honor her brother with a proper burial.

books.title: Lorna Doone
books.author: R. D. Blackmore
books.summary: A young yeoman farmer falls in love with a beautiful girl who belongs to the outlaw clan which killed his father.

books.title: Struggles and Triumphs
books.author: P. T. Barnum
books.summary: The world’s greatest showman tells the story of his life.

books.title: The Lives and Opinions of Eminent Philosophers
books.author: Diogenes Laërtius
books.summary: Brief biographies of the prominent philosophers of ancient Greece.

books.title: The House of Arden
books.author: E. Nesbit
books.summary: Two children, with the aid of a magical white mole, travel into the past in search of their family’s long-lost treasure.

books.title: Figures of Earth
books.author: James Branch Cabell
books.summary: A young swineherd rises to the rank of Count by following his own thinking and desires.

books.title: Hamlet
books.author: William Shakespeare
books.summary: The ghost of the King of Denmark tells his son, Hamlet, to avenge his death.

books.title: The Necklace of Princess Fiorimonde
books.author: Mary De Morgan
books.summary: The second collection of fairy tales by Mary De Morgan.

books.title: The Missing Chums
books.author: Franklin W. Dixon
books.summary: Two friends go missing on a boat trip, and the Hardy Boys investigate.

books.title: Dracula
books.author: Bram Stoker
books.summary: An ancient undead monster terrorizes Victorian London.

books.title: Essays
books.author: Henry David Thoreau
books.summary: A collection of Henry David Thoreau’s essays.

books.title: The Red Thumbmark
books.author: R. Austin Freeman
books.summary: A detective struggles to prove the innocence of a man accused of stealing jewels, in the face of overwhelming evidence.

books.title: The Problems of Philosophy
books.author: Bertrand Russell
books.summary: A beginner’s guide to problems in various fields of philosophy.

books.title: Human Nature and Conduct
books.author: John Dewey
books.summary: Dewey applies the theory of pragmatism to morality, reason, and society.

books.title: Poetry
books.author: Matthew Arnold
books.summary: A collection of occasional and dramatic poems by a Victorian poet, educator, and critic.

books.title: Penguin Island
books.author: Anatole France
books.summary: A myopic saint mistakenly baptizes some penguins, ushering in a centuries-spanning satire of French history.

books.title: The World Set Free
books.author: H. G. Wells
books.summary: Facing the devastation of a nuclear world war, humanity unites under a world government.

books.title: Mr. Mulliner Stories
books.author: P. G. Wodehouse
books.summary: A collection of short stories featuring the eccentric (and hilarious) Mr. Mulliner, who regales the patrons of the Anglers’ Rest with tales of his colorful and amusing relatives.

books.title: The Varieties of Religious Experience
books.author: William James
books.summary: A philospher and psychologist surveys direct religious experiences, including healthy-mindedness, saintliness, conversion and mysticism.

books.title: Sailing Alone Around the World
books.author: Joshua Slocum
books.summary: A sailor gives his account how he completed the first solo sailing voyage around the world.
